zh.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: 美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mather於大約1615年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Thomas Mather41歲，母親Marguerite Abraham48歲。她於1639年9月4日與Dr. Henry Woodward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年8月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Mather于大约1615年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Thomas Mather41岁，母亲Marguerite Abraham48岁。她于1639年9月4日与Dr. Henry Woodward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年8月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mather
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a mower or reaper of grass or hay, Old English mǣthere. Compare Mead , Mower . Hay was formerly of great importance, not only as feed for animals in winter but also for bedding.
variant of Mader , reflecting an alternative pronunciation influenced by Old Norse mathra ‘madder (plant)’.

variants.name: Mader
meanings: English: variant of Madder, an occupational name for a dyer or seller of dye, from Middle English mader, madour, mather, shortened forms of Middle English maderer, maderour, matherer ‘seller of madder’ or ‘dyer who used madder’. Mader or mather (Old English mædere, Old Norse mathra) was the name for the plant Rubia tinctorum, used medicinally and for making red dye. It was also a word for red dye made from other sources. Compare Mather .
German and Swiss German (also Mäder), Dutch and French (Lorraine): occupational name for a reaper or mower, Middle High German māder, mæder, Middle Dutch mader. Compare Moder .
French: metonymic occupational name for a carpenter, from Occitan madier ‘beam’.

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mather was born about 1615, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Mather, was 41 and her mother, Marguerite Abraham, was 48. She married Dr. Henry Woodward on 4 September 1639, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 13 August 1690, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mather est née environ 1615, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Mather, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Abraham, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Dr. Henry Woodward le 4 septembre 1639, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 août 1690, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mather um 1615 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Mather 41 und ihre Mutter Marguerite Abraham 48. Sie hat am 4. September 1639 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Dr. Henry Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. August 1690 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mather è nata il circa 1615 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Mather, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Marguerite Abraham, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Dr. Henry Woodward il 4 settembre 1639, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1690, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Matherが約1615年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Matherは41歳，母Marguerite Abrahamは48歳であった。1639年9月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターでDr. Henry Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1690年8月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mather(이)가 대략 1615년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Mather(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite Abraham(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1639년 9월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 Dr. Henry Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 8월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mather nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Mather, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Abraham, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Dr. Henry Woodward em 4 de setembro de 1639, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1690, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mather родилась около 1615 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Mather было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Abraham, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dr. Henry Woodward 4 сентября 1639 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 13 августа 1690 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Mather nació aproximadamente 1615, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Mather, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Marguerite Abraham, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Dr. Henry Woodward el 4 de septiembre de 1639, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1690, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años.
